name: Execution Linked to Intent
description: Every consequential action must resolve to a declared IntentID — the pre-declared objective and constraint set that authorised it.
rationale: FIX Gap 2. Without an IntentID the execution cannot be linked back to the governance-layer decision that initiated it; minimum required for regulatory decision-chain reconstruction.

examples.fails: Release with no linkable intent record

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
